note: Hand-made MINISCULE static-embedding fixture (NOT a real model). 8 topic dims: [auth, token, http, request, user, billing, invoice, payment]. Committed only under tests/ — never packed into the npm tarball. Rows are float weights; the encoder tokenizes (fold+lowercase+camelCase split, then greedy-longest wordpiece with ## continuations), gathers rows, mean-pools, L2-normalizes and quantizes to int8 at a fixed 1/127 scale. Used to prove byte-determinism without shipping a real model.
